page: Microsoft Azure L4as_v4 is an x86_64 server instance belonging to the Lasv4 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. This configuration features 4 vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB per core, and includes 960 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. No dedicated GPU is included.

Performance benchmarks reveal strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores ranking in the top 25%. Single-threaded bzip3 decompression and text processing also demonstrate strong performance. However, multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores, falls into the average category. Memory bandwidth tests show a notable bottleneck, with both small-block and large-block read-only memory bandwidth registering in the bottom 25%.

Given the 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio and the 960 GB of local storage, this instance is suited for memory-intensive workloads, caching layers, and lightweight database operations, though Passmark database benchmarks perform in the lower 25%. It is also capable of handling static web serving and small-scale LLM inference, though medium-scale LLM inference is highly constrained by the lack of a GPU and weak memory read bandwidth.
description: Microsoft Azure L4as_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Lasv4 family, powered by a dedicated 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 4 vCPUs and 2 physical cores. It features 32.0 GB of RAM, providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio, and includes 960 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU and text processing performance, though multi-core execution and memory read bandwidth are weaker. Lacking a GPU, this instance is best suited for memory-intensive applications, caching, and general-purpose workloads that benefit from high memory-to-core ratios and local storage rather than heavy parallel computation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L4as_v4 is an x86_64 server featuring a 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC processor, 4 vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 960 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads and caching.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L4as_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine with 4 vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and 960 GB of local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC processor.
tagline: An AMD-powered virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and local storage for memory-intensive workloads and caching.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
960 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability

Suited for memory-intensive applications, caching, and light databases
